_note: Human-verified prices. Priority 200 — beats ALL automated sources. Never edit without visiting the official URL and confirming the price yourself.
_workflow: Discrepancy found? 1) Visit official_url  2) Confirm price  3) Add entry here  4) Commit

deepseek-chat._notes: deepseek-chat = DeepSeek-V3.2 (non-thinking). Official: $0.028 cache-hit input, $0.28 cache-miss input, $0.42 output. OpenRouter alias routes to an older version at $0.32/$0.89 — do NOT use openrouter for this model's canonical price.

deepseek-reasoner._notes: deepseek-reasoner = DeepSeek-V3.2 (thinking mode). Same pricing as deepseek-chat per official table (colspan=2). $0.028 cache-hit input, $0.28 cache-miss input, $0.42 output.

gemini-3-pro-image-preview._notes: Image generation model. Text+image input: $2.00/MTok. Text/thinking output: $12.00/MTok. Image output: $120.00/MTok (1120 tokens per 1K/2K image, 2000 tokens per 4K). Batch: 50% off.

gemini-2.5-flash-image._notes: Image generation model. Text+image input: $0.30/MTok. Text output: $2.50/MTok. Image output: $30.00/MTok (1290 tokens per 1K image). Batch: 50% off.

gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview._notes: Image generation model (Flash variant of Gemini 3.1). Text+image input: $0.50/MTok. Text output: $3.00/MTok. Image output: $60.00/MTok (747 tokens at 0.5K, 1120 at 1K, 1680 at 2K, 2520 at 4K). Batch: 50% off.

gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts._notes: TTS model. Official: $0.50 text input / $10.00 audio output per MTok. LiteLLM has stale data ($0.30/$2.50) — likely from an earlier Preview pricing. Output is AUDIO at $10.00 — stored in audio.output, NOT text.output.

gemini-2.5-pro-preview-tts._notes: TTS model. Official: $1.00 text input / $20.00 audio output per MTok. LiteLLM mistakenly uses standard Gemini 2.5 Pro prices ($1.25/$10.00). Output is AUDIO at $20.00 — stored in audio.output, NOT text.output.
